name: musicgen
description: Generate music from a prompt or melody

classifier_free_guidance.description: Increases the influence of inputs on the output. Higher values produce lower-varience outputs that adhere more closely to inputs.
classifier_free_guidance.title: Classifier Free Guidance

continuation.description: If `True`, generated music will continue from `input_audio`. Otherwise, generated music will mimic `input_audio`'s melody.
continuation.title: Continuation

continuation_end.description: End time of the audio file to use for continuation. If -1 or None, will default to the end of the audio clip.
continuation_end.title: Continuation End

continuation_start.description: Start time of the audio file to use for continuation.
continuation_start.title: Continuation Start

duration.description: Duration of the generated audio in seconds.
duration.title: Duration

input_audio.description: An audio file that will influence the generated music. If `continuation` is `True`, the generated music will be a continuation of the audio file. Otherwise, the generated music will mimic the audio file's melody.
input_audio.title: Input Audio

multi_band_diffusion.description: If `True`, the EnCodec tokens will be decoded with MultiBand Diffusion. Only works with non-stereo models.
multi_band_diffusion.title: Multi Band Diffusion

prompt.description: A description of the music you want to generate.
prompt.title: Prompt

seed.description: Seed for random number generator. If None or -1, a random seed will be used.
seed.title: Seed

temperature.description: Controls the 'conservativeness' of the sampling process. Higher temperature means more diversity.
temperature.title: Temperature

top_k.description: Reduces sampling to the k most likely tokens.
top_k.title: Top K

top_p.description: Reduces sampling to tokens with cumulative probability of p. When set to  `0` (default), top_k sampling is used.
top_p.title: Top P
